# Busted Knuckle Auto Repair and Painting

> Professional auto body repair, custom paint, and classic car restoration shop in Lewiston, Idaho. Specializing in high-end custom paint jobs on classic and project cars.

## Services

- Custom automotive paint jobs (candy paint, color matching, pearl and metallic finishes, custom graphics, full resprays)
- Auto body repair (dent repair, panel replacement, frame work, collision repair)
- Classic car restoration (ground-up restorations, project cars, hot rods)
- General auto repair (oil changes, brakes, tune-ups, diagnostics)

## Location

3737 14th Street East, Lewiston, ID 83501
Phone: (208) 553-6155
Serving the Lewis-Clark Valley including Lewiston, ID and Clarkston, WA

## About

Busted Knuckle Auto Repair and Painting is a hands-on auto body and paint shop in Lewiston, Idaho. The shop specializes in high-end custom paint work on classic cars, hot rods, and project builds. Most work is custom, out-of-pocket projects focused on premium craftsmanship. The name "Busted Knuckle" reflects the old-school, hands-on approach to every job.
